channel.title: Deep Learning on Manoj Sankuru
channel.description: Recent content in Deep Learning on Manoj Sankuru

item.title: DGM-CAM: A Lifelong Editing Framework using Dynamic Gradient Masking and Conflict-Aware Merging
item.description: Poster presented at the UMass Dartmouth Sigma Xi 29th Annual Research Exhibition. Introduces Dynamic Gradient Masking and Conflict-Aware Merging to prevent catastrophic forgetting during continuous model editing streams.
